AMENDMENT_REASON: Fixed production evidence is complete; original validity gates were link-blind/over-tight for Spectrum p99 and brittle for rare stalls/control-arm task counts.
_notes: BENCH-02 original single source of truth was committed before data collection for D-04/D-04a/D-04b/D-04c. Phase 243-05 amends future evaluations with a new threshold blob: old icmplib p99 representativeness is retained for audit but no longer causes input_error; gate_p99_delta_pct remains the canonical same-run fping-vs-icmplib p99 regression gate. Zero-stall and first-sample task gates are superseded by bounded stall count/rate and backend-delta task semantics. CPU_NORMALIZATION=per_core fixes cpu_pct to percent-of-whole-machine by dividing by n_cores. Do not duplicate threshold literals in markdown.
